name: 09_raw_exactly_neg_three_representable
description: Raw value exactly -3.0 via a different input combination (symphony_vol == 3.0, multiplier == 1.0). -3.0 is exactly representable in IEEE-754 double precision (sign + integer exponent), so this boundary is bit-exact.
derivation: raw = -(3.0 * 1.0) = -3.0. min(-0.5, -3.0) = -3.0. max(-3.0, -3.0) = -3.0. -3.0 is bit-exact (integer) in IEEE-754; boundary equals VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MIN exactly.
